name: RPlog_The_Humble_Senator
title: The Humble Senator
summary: At a quiet Alderaanian starport, the young Twi'lek Senator Al'Dira of Ord Mantell paces while rehearsing a speech, only to be confronted by the stoic combat medic Galatea, fresh off a shuttle from Mon Calamari. Suspicious and rigid from her Imperial conditioning, Galatea demands his identification and lectures him on the imprudence of loitering exposed given the precarious political climate. The two spar verbally as the senator, charismatic and self-deprecating, insists that a soldier's actions are worth more than a politician's words, while Galatea cuts through his humility, accusing him of being as vile as the corrupt senators he claims to despise. Their exchange exposes shared frustrations: Al'Dira's doubts about the Republic he serves and Galatea's regret at abandoning a lucrative Imperial future to join a faction she fears is committing bureaucratic suicide. Unable to win her respect through words, the dejected senator wishes her luck as she walks away.
